      GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[], aggr=[count(alias1), sum(alias2), sum(alias3)]

GpuProjectExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=104

    GlobalLimitExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=104
      GpuAggregateExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=104
